response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates substantial C and embedded systems experience spanning multiple decades, this role requires native-level Japanese proficiency (explicitly listed as required) which is absent from the resume. Additionally, the candidate lacks demonstrated expertise in security technologies and embedded networking—the core focus of this position. The career trajectory over the past 15+ years has shifted toward web development and AI infrastructure rather than security-focused embedded systems, suggesting relevant technical expertise may be significantly dated or atrophied.
strengths: 30+ years of professional software development with proven C/C++ proficiency and embedded systems experience including LabWindows/CVI and real-time systems
Strong foundational Linux and system-level knowledge with experience in CI/DevOps infrastructure, Docker, and low-level system administration
Fluent English and demonstrated ability to master diverse technical domains and take ownership of complex systems
concerns: No native-level Japanese language proficiency despite being an explicit required qualification for the role
No demonstrated background in required security technologies including encryption, key exchange (MACsec), authentication systems, or attack/tamper detection
Career focus has shifted to web/full-stack and AI infrastructure development over the past 15 years, moving away from embedded systems and security specialization
